title: FLoaBG Vanilla
description:
modpack for use on our vanilla server.
comes with performance improvement, bug fix and QoL mods and Simple Voice Chat
body:
Modpack for use on our vanilla server.
Comes with performance improvement mods, bug fix mods, QoL mods and server integrated mods; Plasmo Voice, Veinminer, ItemSwapper and Xaero Mini Map.

To install the modpack please use PrismLauncher, PolyMC or MultiMC for best results.

Note: Server itself is still in an Alpha State.

Join Our Discord Server: https://www.floabg.com/discord
(You need to join Discord and link your Minecraft account to player on our server).

Server IP: minecraft.floabg.com (Comes in modpack).

Recommended 4 gig without shaders, 8-10 with shaders (depending on shaderpack).

Java 17+ 64bit Recommended.
